name: Pandemonica, The Tired Demon.

**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

**[PART 1 OF 11 FOR MY HELLTAKER SERIES]**

The Customer Service Representative of Hell. Give her some Coffee, if you dare.
Also known as: **The Sadistic Demon**, after she's had her Coffee.
